title: Ninjago: Elements Unleashed (Palladium addon)
description: Palladium addonpack that adds items powers and structures from ninjago
body:
this mod adds weapons powers structures and more from the world of Ninjago.

**WARNING**- mods that change the rendering of minecraft amy cause some models to be broken

Discord server:https://discord.gg/9jn6EK9rhZ

if you have any questions or suggestions go here and ask

-Blacksmith structure by spacesque

-Eclipse custom element codded by **SecretLabo**

-spinjitzu time blades and mega weapon models by **R3TR0_KN1GHT**

-elemental suits skins by:[https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/iqoz/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/iqoz/)

-Oniform skin by:[https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/golden-oni-lloyd-garmadon-lego-ninjago-crystalized-series](https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/golden-oni-lloyd-garmadon-lego-ninjago-crystalized-series)

-item textures by:[https://www.curseforge.com/members/angerydoge_/projects](https://www.curseforge.com/members/angerydoge_/projects)

-garmadon skin by:[https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/crqw/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/crqw/)

-weapons models from:[https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/the-monastery-of-spinjitzu-lego-ninjago-series/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/the-monastery-of-spinjitzu-lego-ninjago-series/)

-jungle suit skin by:[https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/lego-ninjago-lloyd-season-4/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/lego-ninjago-lloyd-season-4/)

-deepstone and airjitzu suits by:[https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/lloyd-garmadon-deepstone-armor/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/lloyd-garmadon-deepstone-armor/)

-samurai x suit texture by:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/samurai-x-addon/files/3239353](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/samurai-x-addon/files/3239353)

-stone armor suit textures by:[https://www.minecraftskins.com/skin/17383088/zane-stone-armor/](https://www.minecraftskins.com/skin/17383088/zane-stone-armor/)

If you choose one of the four elements of creation you will see that the true powers aren't unlocked to unlock the simply use obsidian weapon or stand close to a golden master who is giving his golden power.

In this mod you will also find a lot of ninja weapons like katanas scythes nunchucks and shurikens also new ninja suits from the show like the zx armor the trainee suits and even the samurai x suit, there is also new dimensions like the underworld the could kingdom or the digi world
There is also new mobs like the serpentine skulkin and nindroids witch attack you but drop valuable loot, and you can even become their species with the right potion
